global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：北大与 DeepSeek 联合开源 DSpark：破解 AI 大模型高并发推理瓶颈，速度提升 60% 至 85%；OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 Sol With Restricted Access and Stronger Cyber Safeguards；Anthropic, Google, and Microsoft just built a shared security team for open source. AI is why.。
